localized title: A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
plot outline: Tom Hanks portrays Fred Rogers in a timely story of kindness triumphing over cynicism, based on the true story of a real-life friendship between him and journalist Lloyd Vogel. After a jaded magazine writer (Matthew Rhys) is assigned a profile of Fred Rogers, he overcomes his skepticism, learning about empathy, kindness, and decency from America's most beloved neighbor.
title: A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
original title: A Beautiful Day in the Neighborhood
akas: 邻里美好的一天 (China, Mandarin title)
A Beautiful Day In The Neighborhood (Ireland, English title)
Der Wunderbare Mr. Rogers (Switzerland, English title)
A Beautiful Day in the Neighbourhood (New Zealand, English title)
